name: Fruit Coctail Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the fruit and reserve 1/3 cup of syrup. Chop the fruit and set aside.
2. Cream together butter and sugar, then beat in egg and vanilla.
3. In a separate bowl, stir flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
4. Mix reserved syrup with cherry juice.
5. Alternately add the flour mixture and syrups to the creamed mixture; mix well.
6. Stir in fruit, coconut, and cherries.
7. Spread batter into a greased 9 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 to 35 minutes.
9. Cool completely. If desired, sift powdered sugar over the top and cut into bars.
Makes 24 bars.
